evals.prompt: Design a real-time dashboard for our factory digital twin. It monitors 50 sensors across 12 machines. I need an overview with health status, anomaly highlighting, and the ability to drill down into individual machine telemetry.
evals.expected_output: Dashboard specification including overview layout, health status visualization, anomaly highlighting strategy, drill-down interaction patterns for individual machines, and data refresh rates
expectations: Response contains anomaly or alert visualization
Response addresses information organization across 12 machines and 50 sensors
Response includes specific widget or layout recommendations

evals.prompt: Our digital twin dashboard shows too much data and operators miss critical alerts. Redesign the alert hierarchy and visual priority system so the most important anomalies are impossible to miss.
evals.expected_output: Alert hierarchy design with severity-based visual priority, attention-grabbing strategies for critical anomalies, information density optimization, and progressive disclosure patterns for detailed telemetry
expectations: Response contains information density or cognitive load consideration
Response references progressive disclosure or severity-based design
Response suggests attention-grabbing mechanisms for critical alerts
Response does NOT recommend excessive data display
